Accelerating
the transition to Smart Accounts

Safe is the account abstraction leader on Ethereum and the EVM with the most secure smart wallet infrastructure and platform

Scroll
Safe at scale

Safe accounts hold and protect billions of $$$ in assets

Previously called Gnosis Safe, Safe spun out with a mission to build a better standard for ownership with smart accounts

29M

Total transactions

$75B

Total assets stored

6.1M

Safe accounts deployed

Available on 14+ networks

Developers
Safe CORE

Build on the Safest account abstraction stack

Users
Safe WALLET

Use the most secure
multi-sig wallet in web3

Safe CORE powers 190+ ecosystem projects
in every corner of web3

including projects building DAO tools, DeFi, NFT collectives and institutional custody

Explore ecosystem
Security

Our contracts are
the most
battle-tested

Since 2018, our smart contracts have passed the highest possible security standards in the industry including Formal Verification

Governance

Safe DAO governs the future of Safe

Safe is governed by SafeDAO, a decentralized collective of core contributors, backers, GnosisDAO, users and ecosystem contributors i.e Safe Guardians

Join community

Forum

Follow DAO decisions

Proposals

Guardians

Access your assets anywhere without compromising on security with our flagship interfaces built on Safe Core
